option.name: originalContent
option.value:
package com.app.cashtrackapp.entity
import java.util.Date
data class BankDataType( val op: String, val opDate: Date, val opDescription: String, val opValue: Double )

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
package com.app.cashtrackapp.entity
// Usar tipos primitivos e valores default facilita a serialização com o Firebase data class BankDataType( val op: String = "", val opDate: Long = 0L, // epoch millis val opDescription: String = "", val opValue: Double = 0.0 )

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
